reason: Incomplete: changes sim_projectile signature to add tx,ty params but the snippet only patches the function body, not the call site at simulate.rs:1125. Would fail to compile. A correct fix needs either (a) a multi-location edit (single-snippet apply can't express this — see PR6 design doc note) or (b) a different approach that doesn't change the signature, e.g. capture target coords in a thread-local or pass via the WeaponDef.

Backwards diagnosis. Diff shows sim's pickup code DIDN'T run (predicted tile.acid stayed True, unit.acid stayed False) — agent's fix adds an hp>0 guard MAKING the existing condition more restrictive, but a guard on dead code doesn't enable the dead code. The pickup needs a different trigger or the move path goes through apply_push (whose own acid pickup at lines 893-899 has its own gate that isn't firing). Re-prompt: find out WHY the existing pickup didn't execute for WallMech move D7→D4.
